requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (TCVN IEC 60335-2-24) + CR Conformity Mark
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（TCVN IEC 60335-2-24）+ CR合格标志
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（TCVN IEC 60335-2-24）+ CR合格標誌

summary.en: Electrical safety of household refrigerating appliances in Vietnam is assessed against the Vietnamese adoption of the IEC 60335 series: TCVN 5699-1 (general requirements for household and similar electrical appliances, adopting IEC 60335-1) together with TCVN IEC 60335-2-24 (particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers, adopting IEC 60335-2-24). Low-voltage electrical and electronic products in scope of the relevant national technical regulation (QCVN) must undergo conformity assessment and bear the CR mark (chung nhan hop quy / certificate of conformity) before being placed on the Vietnamese market. Conformity assessment is carried out by a certification or testing body designated by STAMEQ (Directorate for Standards, Metrology and Quality) under the Ministry of Science and Technology. Testing covers protection against electric shock, mechanical and thermal hazards, abnormal operation, and the flammable-refrigerant provisions where R-600a is used.
summary.zh: 越南家用制冷器具的电气安全依据IEC 60335系列的越南采标评定：TCVN 5699-1（家用及类似电器通用要求，采用IEC 60335-1）连同TCVN IEC 60335-2-24（制冷器具、冰淇淋机及制冰机特殊要求，采用IEC 60335-2-24）。属相关国家技术法规（QCVN）范围内的低压电气电子产品，在投放越南市场前须经合格评定并加施CR标志（chung nhan hop quy／合格证明）。合格评定由科学技术部下属计量标准质量总局（STAMEQ）指定的认证或检测机构进行。检测涵盖触电防护、机械及热危险、非正常运行，以及使用R-600a时的可燃制冷剂条款。
summary.zht: 越南家用製冷器具的電氣安全依據IEC 60335系列的越南採標評定：TCVN 5699-1（家用及類似電器通用要求，採用IEC 60335-1）連同TCVN IEC 60335-2-24（製冷器具、冰淇淋機及製冰機特殊要求，採用IEC 60335-2-24）。屬相關國家技術法規（QCVN）範圍內的低壓電氣電子產品，在投放越南市場前須經合格評定並加施CR標誌（chung nhan hop quy／合格證明）。合格評定由科學技術部下屬計量標準質量總局（STAMEQ）指定的認證或檢測機構進行。檢測涵蓋觸電防護、機械及熱危險、非正常運行，以及使用R-600a時的可燃製冷劑條款。

standards_or_laws: TCVN IEC 60335-2-24 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances (adoption of IEC 60335-2-24)
TCVN 5699-1 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — General requirements (adoption of IEC 60335-1)
Law No. 68/2006/QH11 on Standards and Technical Regulations + Law No. 05/2007/QH12 on Product and Goods Quality (CR-mark conformity-assessment framework, administered by STAMEQ/MOST)

summary.en: In China, electrical safety of household refrigerators is governed by GB 4706.1 (general requirements, equivalent to IEC 60335-1) and GB 4706.13 (particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, equivalent to IEC 60335-2-24). Household refrigerators are within the scope of China Compulsory Certification (CCC / 3C), so a CCC certificate based on GB 4706.1 and GB 4706.13 testing and factory inspection is required before sale in China. While the GB 4706 series is technically aligned with the IEC 60335 series that Vietnam adopts as TCVN, the CCC certificate and the Vietnamese CR mark are separate national conformity schemes issued by different designated bodies and are not mutually recognised.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用电冰箱的电气安全由GB 4706.1（通用要求，等同IEC 60335-1）及GB 4706.13（制冷器具特殊要求，等同IEC 60335-2-24）管辖。家用电冰箱属中国强制性产品认证（CCC／3C）范围，故在中国销售前须取得基于GB 4706.1及GB 4706.13检测及工厂检查的CCC证书。虽然GB 4706系列在技术上与越南采为TCVN的IEC 60335系列一致，但CCC证书与越南CR标志是由不同指定机构签发的独立国家合格制度，互不承认。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用電冰箱的電氣安全由GB 4706.1（通用要求，等同IEC 60335-1）及GB 4706.13（製冷器具特殊要求，等同IEC 60335-2-24）管轄。家用電冰箱屬中國強制性產品認證（CCC／3C）範圍，故在中國銷售前須取得基於GB 4706.1及GB 4706.13檢測及工廠檢查的CCC證書。雖然GB 4706系列在技術上與越南採為TCVN的IEC 60335系列一致，但CCC證書與越南CR標誌是由不同指定機構簽發的獨立國家合格制度，互不承認。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.1 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — General requirements (equivalent to IEC 60335-1)
GB 4706.13 — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances (equivalent to IEC 60335-2-24)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC / 3C) — mandatory for household refrigerators sold in China

gap.en: Although GB 4706.13 and TCVN IEC 60335-2-24 share the same IEC 60335-2-24 base, three gaps remain: (1) Separate conformity scheme — a Chinese CCC certificate is not accepted in Vietnam; the product must be assessed by a STAMEQ-designated body and carry the CR mark. (2) National differences (national deviations and the Vietnamese-language documentation, voltage 220 V single-phase 50 Hz, plug/cord and rating-plate requirements) must be verified against the TCVN adoption rather than assumed identical to the GB version. (3) Flammable-refrigerant clauses — because most Chinese export refrigerators use R-600a, the Annex/flammability provisions of TCVN IEC 60335-2-24 (charge limit, marking, construction) must be demonstrated in the Vietnamese conformity file. Existing GB 4706.13 test reports can shorten testing if the certification body accepts them as supporting evidence, but a fresh CR conformity assessment is generally required.
gap.zh: 尽管GB 4706.13与TCVN IEC 60335-2-24同以IEC 60335-2-24为基础，仍存在三项差距：（1）独立合格制度——中国CCC证书在越南不被接受；产品须经STAMEQ指定机构评定并加施CR标志。（2）国家差异（国家偏差及越南语文件、电压220V单相50Hz、插头/电源线及铭牌要求）须按TCVN采标核实，不可假定与GB版本完全相同。（3）可燃制冷剂条款——因多数中国出口冰箱采用R-600a，TCVN IEC 60335-2-24的附件/可燃性条款（充注量限值、标识、结构）须在越南合格文件中予以证明。若认证机构接受现有GB 4706.13检测报告作为支持证据，可缩短检测，但通常仍须进行全新的CR合格评定。
gap.zht: 儘管GB 4706.13與TCVN IEC 60335-2-24同以IEC 60335-2-24為基礎，仍存在三項差距：（1）獨立合格制度——中國CCC證書在越南不被接受；產品須經STAMEQ指定機構評定並加施CR標誌。（2）國家差異（國家偏差及越南語文件、電壓220V單相50Hz、插頭/電源線及銘牌要求）須按TCVN採標核實，不可假定與GB版本完全相同。（3）可燃製冷劑條款——因多數中國出口冰箱採用R-600a，TCVN IEC 60335-2-24的附件/可燃性條款（充注量限值、標識、結構）須在越南合格文件中予以證明。若認證機構接受現有GB 4706.13檢測報告作為支持證據，可縮短檢測，但通常仍須進行全新的CR合格評定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — electrical-safety conformity to TCVN IEC 60335-2-24 / TCVN 5699-1 and the CR mark issued by a STAMEQ-designated body are required before market placement where the product falls within the applicable QCVN scope
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC (3C) certification based on GB 4706.1 and GB 4706.13 required before sale of household refrigerators in China

source.publisher: STAMEQ — Directorate for Standards, Metrology and Quality (Ministry of Science and Technology, Vietnam)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical-safety conformity to TCVN IEC 60335-2-24 with the CR mark is a Vietnamese national requirement separate from China CCC. The shared IEC 60335-2-24 base helps, but a Chinese CCC/GB 4706.13 certificate is not recognised — a STAMEQ-designated body must perform the CR conformity assessment, verifying national deviations and the R-600a flammability provisions before market placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据TCVN IEC 60335-2-24并加施CR标志的电气安全合格，是独立于中国CCC的越南国家要求。共用IEC 60335-2-24基础有所助益，但中国CCC/GB 4706.13证书不被承认——须由STAMEQ指定机构进行CR合格评定，在投放市场前核实国家偏差及R-600a可燃性条款。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據TCVN IEC 60335-2-24並加施CR標誌的電氣安全合格，是獨立於中國CCC的越南國家要求。共用IEC 60335-2-24基礎有所助益，但中國CCC/GB 4706.13證書不被承認——須由STAMEQ指定機構進行CR合格評定，在投放市場前核實國家偏差及R-600a可燃性條款。
